---
title: "dataset_exploration"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
# Load packages
library(tidyverse)

```

```{r}
# Loading historic landmarks data for historic districts!
historic_landmarks <- read_csv("../data/historic_landmarks.csv") # .. means one folder up
```
```{r}
# Filtering the historic landmarks dataset to make sure that only historic districts are present
historic_districts <- historic_landmarks %>% 
  mutate(name_lower = tolower(`Property Name`)) %>% 
  filter(str_detect(name_lower, "historic district"))
```
```{r}
# CLeaning the historic_districts dataset so only the columns we want are prsent
# and adding location
```
